infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: RentFlow uses the camera so field agents can photograph property condition during viewings and upload them to the listing.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: RentFlow needs access to your photos so you can upload property images and content from your gallery.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: RentFlow saves marketing photos for the property listings you publish to your camera roll.

plugins.photosPermission: RentFlow needs access to your photos so you can upload property images.
plugins.cameraPermission: RentFlow uses the camera to capture property condition during viewings.

plugins.photosPermission: RentFlow saves listing photos to your camera roll for posting on classifieds and groups.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: RentFlow needs to save photos to your camera roll.
